Glauca · type specimen · IBM Plex Serif headings / IBM Plex Sans body / IBM Plex Sans · IBM Plex Mono

The role ladder

IBM Plex Serif carries display down to subhead; IBM Plex Sans carries body-lg and body; IBM Plex Sans the captions and data; IBM Plex Mono the eyebrow and code.

The bloom
.gl-headline

The natural sun
.gl-title
IBM Plex Serif · opsz 60 · wght 600 · lh 1.12 · WONK
Believe the cold, clear light
.gl-subhead
IBM Plex Serif · opsz 32 · wght 600 · lh 1.2
Look long on the pale, still field
.gl-body-lg
IBM Plex Sans · opsz 12 · wght 400 · lh 1.6
The bloom is what sets the leaf apart — that pale, glaucous wax laid over the green like cold light held still. Set one blue point on that quiet field, and the whole page turns to reading.
.gl-body
IBM Plex Sans · opsz 10 · wght 400 · lh 1.62
There is a wisdom that is woe; but there is a woe that is madness. And there is a Catskill eagle in some souls that can alike dive down into the blackest gorges, and soar out of them again and become invisible in the sunny spaces. And even if he forever flies within the gorge, that gorge is in the mountains.
.gl-caption
IBM Plex Sans · wght 400 · lh 1.45
IBM Plex Sans holds the captions and small print.
.gl-eyebrow
IBM Plex Mono · wght 500 · lh 1.2
a glaucous-bloom design system
